_comment: Named BUILD PROFILES — each client gets its own feature set. deploy_release.py builds the 'active_profile' (override with --profile <name>). A feature=false is burnt into dist/dashboard/feature_flags.py: blueprint not registered + nav/UI hidden via ff(); if the feature is ALSO listed in deploy_release FEATURE_FILES its source files are physically removed from the dist (used for internal IP). The source dashboard/feature_flags.py stays all-ON for dev.
_notes: ai_executor / account_factory / assistant_chat — internal AI IP. Physically removed from dist (FEATURE_FILES) AND flag-disabled.
mother_dashboard — flag-disabled only (route not registered + hidden from home page); source files stay (not secret IP).
Add a new client = add a profile here, set active_profile (or build with --profile <name>).
automation/ai_executor/ is shared by ai_executor + account_factory — dropped only when BOTH are off.
